selection.upgrade_path: Add embedding retrieval only after keyword routing becomes noisy.

skills.description: Edit, review, prune, and debug AGENTS.md without bloating the global prompt.
Forecasting and decision support for trades, deadlines, and irreversible choices where shallow uncertainty language would be harmful.
How an LLM agent should emit a structured decision (mode flag, control action, state change) to its host — tool call, not a typed marker that leaks into the transcript.
activation_signals: model signaling a mode or action
quiet run or silent run feature
marker or tag leaking into transcript
registering or naming an agent tool
